sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa hong piak thupha, kei leh ka innkuan aading,
Kicing hi, hong hehpihna ka phat ding,
Neek leh dawn, silh leh ten, Nisim zat ding sum leh pai,
Hong pia hi, ka sapna hong cing sak hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kei aading hong hepihna ki cinghi.]2

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Asi hang mawh maina, Aliamma hangin damna,
Hong pia hi, hong hehpihna ka phat ding.
A khawnkhong nuntakna, A zawngkhal na hang hauhna
Hong pia hi, hong hehpihna ki cing hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Thanem te tha hat na, cidam lo te tung damna,
Hong pia hi, hong hehpihna ka phat ding,
Lunggim mi lungdamna, a ki hen mi suahtakna,
Hong pia hi hong hehpinna ki cing hi.
